prompt: Tengo un nuevo microservicio ms-payments que necesita consumir una cola SQS FIFO...

assertions.name: listener-has-start-end-logs
assertions.text: The SQS listener contains START and END log entries

assertions.name: listener-catches-exception
assertions.text: The SQS listener catches broad Exception (not a specific subtype) to avoid retry storms

assertions.name: yaml-config-present
assertions.text: Output includes YAML configuration referencing the queue URL under a structured property path
